channel.title: shreehari.bi — Microsoft Fabric & Power BI Blog
channel.description: Practical writing on Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, DAX, Power Query, and SQL from Shreehari Bhattarai.

item.title: Context Transition in DAX, Explained With Real Measures
item.description: Why CALCULATE changes everything, and how to reason about row context vs. filter context without memorizing rules.

item.title: Direct Lake vs. Import vs. DirectQuery: Choosing the Right Storage Mode
item.description: A practical framework for picking a Fabric semantic model storage mode based on data volume, freshness, and cost.

item.title: PL-300 Exam Guide: A Study Plan That Actually Works
item.description: An eight-week PL-300 study plan built around Microsoft Learn, sandbox practice, and mock exams.
